title: lagenocypsela papuana
intro: Lagenocypsela papuana, also known as the Papuan lagenocypsela, is a plant species native to Papua New Guinea, belonging to the family Compositae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Lagenocypsela papuana is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
